links.title: Crimestoppers
links.description: An independent charity that gives people the power to speak up and stop crime, 100% anonymously.

locations.name: Maltby Police Station
locations.address:
Byford Road,
Maltby
Rotherham
South Yorkshire

description:
We are a non-emergency team. Feel free to contact us directly or via 101. We deal with the neighbourhood issues that concern you but aren't an emergency. These range from anti social behaviour, off road bikes, neighbour disputes to general patrols to engage with you. This is over a varied area ranging from urban to rural. We work alongside partners at Maltby police station as part of the wider Rotherham partnership so we can assist in non police issues such as trading standard. This gives us the best opportunity to achieve our aim of making Rotherham South as safe as possible.

Our priorities are generated by what we are told at our community meetings. If you think we need to focus our resources on something please come along and let us know.
